lifeos-vault.description: Use for the LifeOS V3 Obsidian vault, AI Universe control plane, policies, decisions, schemas, prompts, dashboards, and project context.

lifeos-runtime.description: Use for LifeOS V3 AI runtime definitions, references, copied Superpowers skills, Agency agent references, context packs, schemas, and future MCP definitions.

lifeos-source.description: Use as the current high-level LifeOS V3 planning source of truth.

agency-agents.description: Use as reference-only Agency agent role specs and coordination guidance. Prefer installed OpenCode subagents for execution.

superpowers.description: Use for Superpowers workflow skills, including using-superpowers, writing-plans, systematic-debugging, verification-before-completion, and multi-agent workflows.
